name: getOrchestrationEngine
description: Returns the orchestration engine adapter for the specified backend.

name: runAgentTask
signature: (profile: AgentProfile, task: AgentTask, context?: AgentContext) => Promise<AgentResult>
description: Runs a task using the specified agent profile and context.
usage: const result = await engine.runAgentTask(profile, task, context);

name: listCapabilities
description: Lists all available helpers, adapters, and plugins.
